ValidationRule.description: Operations, New Operation System Administrator Finance, New Finance
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName),"Lab Received"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e0b000001nOvW"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e5a0000018d9a"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e0b000001iU5h"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e5a000001OuCR"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e0b000001nOvl"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e5a0000018d9G"), ($User.Id = "0055a000009fhxPAAQ") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You Can Not Edit This Opportunity Because Lab Was Received
